craigslist.title: Affordable Living: Clean, Safe, With a Kitchen
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post *This is a Monthly Price, Plus Tax Apartment Style Living with No Lease! Introducing the best value extended-stay accommodations in the area! With our all-inclusive pricing, you can pay weekly or monthly and save hundreds of dollars every month. We don't require a lease, deposit, or credit check, making it easy to move in and out whenever it suits your schedule. Free Amenities: No Deposit - Check-in any time Free Bi-weekly Housekeeping - Relax and enjoy your time! Free Utilities - Electric, A/C & Heat Flexible Payment Plans - Pay weekly or monthly Take a tour to see why we are different and better! Save hundreds every month! Full Kitchens - Save $money$ by cooking your own meals Free Wi-Fi & Cable Various Studio Layouts; Choose what's right for you! No Lease - Check out on your schedule Secure property with key-controlled access Great all inclusive prices. The best value in town! On-Site Laundry: Available 24/7 for your convenience. Fully Equipped Kitchens: Each room features dual stove-top burners, microwaves, full-size sinks, and refrigerators, allowing you to save even more on meals! Safety and Security: Our staff is on-site around the clock, and the property is key-controlled 24/7 for your peace of mind. Pet-Friendly: We welcome up to two dogs under 50 lbs. (pet fee applies). Book Your Stay Today! Experience the best value in extended-stay accommodations! Contact Us Now! Call or email to reserve your spot! Limited-Time Offer for New Guests Only! Call: show contact info Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. Photos may not be of the exact advertised unit. Contact us today for the most up to date information. Extra charge for additional beds.

craigslist.title: Central Air Conditioning, Professional Landscaping, 2B/1.5B
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 2422 Banks Edge Way, Reynoldsburg, OH 43068 Creekside at Taylor Square is where Reynoldsburg discovers home. Our 1 & 2 bedroom apartments, along with our 2 & 3 bedroom townhomes offer residents an unmatched living experience. Each home comes with enriching amenities like double-galley kitchen layouts, energy-efficient appliances, plush carpeting, and private patios. Select homes feature additional amenities like fireplaces, high ceilings, and connected garages. The community grounds include two resort-style pools, a professional fitness center, outdoor grill stations, and an enclosed bark park for dogs to play and mingle off-leash. Residents make daily use of the open, green lawn space, which is meticulously maintained by our on-site staff. Creekside at Taylor Square is also conveniently situated off I-70 on the east side of Columbus, providing easy access to downtown and the surrounding areas. Cherished local restaurants and shopping centers are located just around the corner. This is how home should feel. Apartment Features: Stainless Steel Appliances Walk-Out Patio Upgraded Features Attached Garage with Specific Floor Plans 1st Floor 2nd Floor Patio Community Features: Amazon Package Locker System Two Resort-Style Swimming Pools & Sundeck 24hr. Emergency Maintenance Central Air Conditioning Community Grill and Picnic Areas Key Fob Amenity Access Flex Rent Payments Rentable Garages Professional Landscaping Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://livingmonarch.com/xdevwpcf/creekside-at-taylor-square Equal Housing Opportunity. Specials are based on availability and may expire or change at any time. Specials and discounts may not be combined. Rates are subject to change without advance notice.
